title: Add LilyGO Zephyr board target skeleton
description:
Why this exists: LICHEN needs a Zephyr board target for the selected LilyGO device before app firmware can build reproducibly. What needs to be done: add board directory, board metadata, Kconfig defaults, defconfig, DTS/DTSI, pinctrl, flash/partition assumptions, chosen nodes, aliases, and HAL capability properties following the R1/R1 Neo board-target pattern where appropriate. Acceptance criteria: samr34_xpro

t_deck
t_echo exposes the selected LilyGO target; a minimal Zephyr hello/sample build succeeds; devicetree chosen nodes and aliases expose radio, BLE/serial, display/input/GNSS/power only where confirmed; no app code gets board-specific ifdefs.
notes: Implemented and verified 2026-06-30. Source changes: lichen/boards/lilygo/t_deck/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.dts now asserts GPIO10 peripheral power via gpio-hog, keeps shared SPI TFT CS GPIO12 and SD CS GPIO39 deselected with labeled active-low gpio-hogs, updates Meshtastic source path comment, and models SX1262 DIO3 TCXO at 1.8 V with 5 ms startup. Review: three codereview passes ran. Passes 1/2/3 initially found P1 active-low CS hog polarity; fixed by changing TFT/SD hogs to output-low. Pass 3 also found unlabeled hogs, stale Meshtastic path, and 16 MB partition-layout risk; fixed labels/path and created project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.14 for flash layout plus project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.15 for shared SPI display/SD modeling. Verification: local macOS west configure generated DTS/Kconfig but failed at compile because /Volumes/Attic/zephyr-sdk-0.16.8 lacks xtensa-espressif_esp32s3_zephyr-elf-gcc. EC2 isolated workspace with ZEPHYR_BASE unset, Zephyr SDK 0.16.8, Zephyr v3.7.0: west build -p always -b t_deck/esp32s3/procpu lichen/apps/puck -d build/t_deck_puck passed. Puck memory: FLASH 204172 B / 8388352 B (2.43%), IRAM 49852 B / 329 KB (14.80%), DRAM 70936 B / 313 KB (22.13%), IROM 67250 B / 8 MB, DROM 138636 B / 8 MB. Generated evidence: CONFIG_GPIO_HOGS=y, CONFIG_LORA_SX126X=y; zephyr.dts contains zephyr,lora=&lora0, periph-pwr-hog, t_deck_tft_cs_hog, t_deck_sd_cs_hog, dio2-tx-enable, dio3-tcxo-voltage=<0x2>, tcxo-power-startup-delay-ms=<0x5>. Remaining hardware validation is physical smoke and revision confirmation under project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.13/.10/.11.
close_reason: T-Deck board DTS skeleton corrected and verified by isolated EC2 puck build with generated GPIO hog/SX1262 TCXO evidence; follow-ups filed for flash layout and shared SPI display/SD modeling.
